title: Develop, control the centre, castle
description: A first lesson on coordinating pieces safely.
sections: Use central pawns to gain space and open lines.
Develop knights and bishops before moving the same piece repeatedly.
Castle once the centre is stable and the path is clear.

tasks.prompt: Choose a developing move for White.

title: Knight forks
description: Learn how one knight can attack two valuable targets.
sections: Knights attack in an L-shape and can jump over pieces.
A fork is strongest when it attacks the king and another valuable piece.
